briefdescription.para: Enum structure of Mailbox Interrupt id.
Payload packet structure - must match NEW_RPU binary layout.
Enum structure of Mailbox Interrupt id.
Structure of fifo control (shared memory - must match RPU layout)

detaileddescription.para: Structure of Mbox post message - must match NEW_RPU binary layout.

briefdescription.para: Initialize a Fifo with given input.

parameterdescription.para: Fifo init data for construct the fifo

briefdescription.para: Write a given meg to the fifo.
Read a given meg from the fifo.
Check current FIFO is full or not.
Check current FIFO is empty or not.
osFree FifoControl buffer data, only used if the buffer is assigned by

detaileddescription.para:
osMalloc() or similar function
mbox_fifo
MboxFifoCtrl info pointer
